heading: Patents or homesteads subject to vested and accrued water rights
label: 52 Patents or homesteads subject to vested and accrued water rights
text: All patents granted, or homesteads allowed, shall be subject to any vested and accrued water rights, or rights to ditches and reservoirs used in connection with such water rights, as may have been acquired under or recognized by .1section 51 of this titleSee Repeal; Savings Provision note below.1
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2340 derived from , .act July 9, 1870, ch. 235, § 1716 Stat. 218Section is also set out as the second par. of , Public Lands.section 661 of Title 43

Repeal; Savings ProvisionProvision of this section, “, or rights to ditches and reservoirs used in connection with such water rights,” was repealed by , , , effective on and after , insofar as applicable to the issuance of rights-of-way over, upon, under, and through the public lands and lands in the National Forest System. Such repeal not to be construed as terminating any valid lease, permit, patent, etc., existing on , see , set out as a note under , Public Lands.Pub.
